backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, social links, and terms, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: replacing the single Internet Identity button on the Register page Step 2 and Login page with four distinct auth option buttons (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Passkey), each triggering the Internet Identity flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, pages, hooks, and contexts.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app that loads Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, register, login, tournaments, dashboard, terms, admin login, admin dashboard), wraps the router with QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and AdminAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /admin by checking isAdminAuthenticated from AdminAuthContext, rendering children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/AuthMethodButton: Reusable component that renders four authentication option buttons (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Passkey) with their respective SVG icons, each calling a shared onMethodClick handler to trigger the Internet Identity login flow, with a loading state fallback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from a query hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/register or dashboard/logout) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a flex-column container, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for joining a tournament by spending wallet coins, showing balance, entry fee, and handling success/error states via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: HOC that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when the player is authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state persisted in localStorage, with login/logout functions and legacy compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) persisted in localStorage, with login and logout helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for all backend interactions including tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets, social links, and terms & conditions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Exo 2), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds brand gradient and scrollbar utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar navigation and tabbed content sections for managing tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets, social links, and terms & conditions.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Two-phase admin login page with hardcoded credentials for each phase, redirecting to the admin dashboard upon successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with a responsive sidebar for navigating profile, tournaments, wallet, withdrawals, and support tabs, using multiple query hooks to fetch and display user-specific data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons and a features grid highlighting the platform's tournament offerings for BGMI players.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, fetches their profile from the backend actor, and redirects to the player dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page that collects display name, mobile, and BGMI Player ID, then authenticates via Internet Identity and registers the player on the backend.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the platform's Terms & Conditions fetched from the backend, falling back to hardcoded content, with numbered sections rendered in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all BGMI tournaments with search and status filter controls, and opens a PaymentModal when an authenticated user clicks to register for a tournament.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors, fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Exo 2), shadows, gradients, and animation plugins for the esports platform UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of a BGMI tournament registration app project, documenting existing features and pending requests to replace single Internet Identity auth buttons with four distinct Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey buttons on both the Register Step 2 and Login pages.
